'''ây-g-n-k''' ('''kayagnekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:label|label]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-g-n-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:label|label]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-g-n-k
|-
! Lemma
| kayagnekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyagnekoko|thiyagnekoko]] || [[word:jiyagnekoko|jiyagnekoko]] || [[word:shiyagnekoko|shiyagnekoko]] || [[word:kiyagnekoko|kiyagnekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyagnekoko|thuthuyagnekoko]] || [[word:jujuyagnekoko|jujuyagnekoko]] || [[word:shushuyagnekoko|shushuyagnekoko]] || [[word:kukuyagnekoko|kukuyagnekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyagnekoko|thuyagnekoko]] || [[word:juyagnekoko|juyagnekoko]] || [[word:shuyagnekoko|shuyagnekoko]] || [[word:kuyagnekoko|kuyagnekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyagnekoko|thuyagnekoko]] || [[word:juyagnekoko|juyagnekoko]] || [[word:shuyagnekoko|shuyagnekoko]] || [[word:kuyagnekoko|kuyagnekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyagnekoko|theyagnekoko]] || [[word:jeyagnekoko|jeyagnekoko]] || [[word:sheyagnekoko|sheyagnekoko]] || [[word:keyagnekoko|keyagnekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyagnekoko|thothoyagnekoko]] || [[word:jojoyagnekoko|jojoyagnekoko]] || [[word:shoshoyagnekoko|shoshoyagnekoko]] || [[word:kokoyagnekoko|kokoyagnekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyagnekoko|thoyagnekoko]] || [[word:joyagnekoko|joyagnekoko]] || [[word:shoyagnekoko|shoyagnekoko]] || [[word:koyagnekoko|koyagnekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyagnekoko|thoyagnekoko]] || [[word:joyagnekoko|joyagnekoko]] || [[word:shoyagnekoko|shoyagnekoko]] || [[word:koyagnekoko|koyagnekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠyagnekoko|thĂŠyagnekoko]] || [[word:jĂŠyagnekoko|jĂŠyagnekoko]] || [[word:shĂŠyagnekoko|shĂŠyagnekoko]] || [[word:kĂŠyagnekoko|kĂŠyagnekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayagnekoko|thathayagnekoko]] || [[word:jajayagnekoko|jajayagnekoko]] || [[word:shashayagnekoko|shashayagnekoko]] || [[word:kakayagnekoko|kakayagnekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayagnekoko|thayagnekoko]] || [[word:jayagnekoko|jayagnekoko]] || [[word:shayagnekoko|shayagnekoko]] || [[word:kayagnekoko|kayagnekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayagnekoko|thayagnekoko]] || [[word:jayagnekoko|jayagnekoko]] || [[word:shayagnekoko|shayagnekoko]] || [[word:kayagnekoko|kayagnekoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
